article.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
article.summary: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 推出個人理財 ChatGPT，允許連接銀行帳戶
article.summary_zh: 用戶連接帳戶後，將看到包括投資組合表現、支出、訂閱和即將到期付款的儀表板。

article.title: Texas county passes data center ban for rural areas for a year, move comes in wake of AI data centers moving to remote areas to skirt regulations — state senator says counties cannot legally impose these bans
article.summary: Hill County passed a one-year ban on data center projects, as the country authorities study the effects their effects on the community. Still, the County Attorney warned that they could get sued if they pass this moratorium, with a Texas State Senator asking the State Attorney General to investigate counties that have done so.
article.title_zh: 德克薩斯州縣通過對農村地區數據中心一年禁令，此舉出現在AI數據中心遷往偏遠地區以規避監管之後 — 州參議員稱縣無法合法實施這些禁令
article.summary_zh: 希爾縣通過了為期一年的數據中心項目禁令，同時國家當局正在研究其對社區的影響；然而，縣檢察官警告他們可能被起訴。

article.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Finance, lets you connect your bank accounts
article.summary: ChatGPT can now take care of your personal finances, which definitely sounds like a good idea. In the US, subscribers to ChatGPT Pro can now connect accounts from over 12,000 financial institutions, thanks to a partnership OpenAI has established with the financial connection service Plaid. Once you connect your account(s) to ChatGPT, you'll see a dashboard of your portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments. ChatGPT can answer questions about your spending or plans to save money with context from your actual financial situation. You can manage the...
article.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Finance，讓你連接銀行帳戶
article.summary_zh: ChatGPT Pro 用戶現可連接超過 12,000 家金融機構的帳戶，透過與 Plaid 的合作協議來管理個人財務。

article.title: Samsung starts winding down chip production six days before planned 18-day strike — company enters 'emergency management mode,' daily losses could hit $2 billion
article.summary: Samsung Electronics has reportedly begun throttling semiconductor output by cutting new wafer input and placing lithography, etching, and cleaning equipment on standby.
article.title_zh: Samsung 在計畫 18 天罷工前六天開始減產晶片 — 公司進入「緊急管理模式」，每日損失可能達 20 億美元
article.summary_zh: Samsung Electronics 據報開始透過減少新晶圓投入並待命光刻、蝕刻和清潔設備來降低半導體產量。

article.title: Google floats reduced initial 5GB free cloud storage limit, users claim — 15GB to require extra security measures, company confirms it is 'testing a new storage policy for new accounts'
article.summary: While Google has not publicly announced the change, the company confirmed that it is testing a new approach designed to improve account security and data recovery.
article.title_zh: Google 考慮降低免費雲端儲存空間至 5GB，用戶聲稱需要 — 15GB 將需要額外安全措施，公司確認正在「測試新帳戶儲存政策」
article.summary_zh: 雖然 Google 尚未公開宣佈此變更，但公司確認正在測試新方法以改善帳戶安全性和資料恢復功能。

article.title: First Apple M5 memory exploit discovered using Anthropic AI, gives root access on MacOS — Claude Mythos helps security researchers bypass Memory Integrity Enforcement
article.summary: Apple M5 architecture gets its first privilege escalation exploit
article.title_zh: 首個Apple M5記憶體漏洞被發現，使用Anthropic AI，授予MacOS根訪問權限 — Claude Mythos幫助安全研究人員繞過Memory Integrity Enforcement
article.summary_zh: Apple M5架構發現其首個權限提升漏洞。

article.title: The Hardware Crunch: How Supply Chain Turbulence Is Forcing a New IT Playbook
article.summary: Infrastructure teams are facing a perfect storm: extended hardware lead times, rising costs driven by AI demand, and accelerated platform timelines.
article.title_zh: 硬體危機：供應鏈波動如何推動新的 IT 方案
article.summary_zh: 基礎設施團隊正面臨完美風暴：硬體交付時間延長、AI 需求推高的成本，以及加快的平台時間表。

article.title: Calif team details how Anthropic Mythos helped build a working macOS exploit in five days
article.summary: The team behind the first public macOS kernel memory corruption exploit on M5 silicon has shared fresh details on how Mythos Preview helped bypass a five-year Apple security effort in five days. more…
article.title_zh: 加州團隊詳述 Anthropic Mythos 如何在五天內幫助構建可運行的 macOS 漏洞利用
article.summary_zh: 首個 M5 晶片 macOS 核心記憶體損壞漏洞的背後團隊分享了 Mythos Preview 如何在五天內繞過五年來蘋果安全防護的詳細信息。

article.title: Fitbit 4.69 rolls out with redesign of focus stats and logging
article.summary: Google has rolled out version 4.69 of Fitbit for Android as the last update before the Google Health rebrand . more…
article.title_zh: Fitbit 4.69 推出，重新設計焦點統計和記錄功能
article.summary_zh: Google 推出了 Fitbit Android 版本 4.69，這是 Google Health 品牌更新前的最後一次更新。

article.title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
article.summary: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.
article.title_zh: Osaurus 為你的 Mac 帶來本地和雲端 AI 模型
article.summary_zh: Osaurus 在 Mac 應用程式中結合本地和雲端 AI 模型，讓使用者的記憶、檔案和工具保留在自己的硬體上。

article.title: OpenAI just released new personal finance features for ChatGPT customers
article.summary: OpenAI is catching up with some competitors and offering new personal finance features inside ChatGPT. The new personal finance experience is rolling out starting today for some subscribers. more…
article.title_zh: OpenAI 為 ChatGPT 客戶推出新個人理財功能
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出新的個人理財功能，開始向部分訂閱用戶推出。

article.title: Your back deserves a better desk chair – LiberNovo Maxis and Omni chairs are designed just for you
article.summary: If you’re currently sitting at a desk for work or gaming and feel that little ache in your back, you’re not along. Thankfully, LiberNovo has a solution in its Maxis and Omni chairs that are designed not only to be the ultimate ergonomic solution – Omni is the world’s first dynamic ergonomic chair and the winner of the Red Dot Product Design and iF Design awards for 2026, with GreenGuard Gold Certified on top of that – but also designed for you in mind, not just the “Average Joe.” more…
article.title_zh: 您的背部值得更好的辦公椅 – LiberNovo Maxis 和 Omni 椅專為您設計
article.summary_zh: LiberNovo 推出 Maxis 和 Omni 人體工學椅，為長時間工作或遊戲的用戶提供完美的背部支撐解決方案。

article.title: Claude helps recover $400,000 in Bitcoin after a very expensive stoner mistake
article.summary: Credit: Calvin Wankhede / Android Authority TL;DR An X user says Claude helped him recover access to 5 Bitcoin after 11 years. The user says the AI found an old wallet file that worked with an old password clue. The recovered Bitcoin was originally purchased for around $1,250 and is now worth almost $400,000. There’s a whole subgenre of crypto horror stories built around people who bought Bitcoin early, realized they’d lost access to it once the value skyrocketed, and then had to spend the next decade staring into the middle distance. One especially famous case involves a man who’s now dedicated his life to searching a Welsh landfill for a small fortune. This latest tale looked like it belonged in the same pile, until Claude apparently helped give an 11-year Bitcoin search saga a happy end
article.title_zh: Claude 幫助用戶在一次昂貴的失誤後恢復 $40 萬比特幣
article.summary_zh: 一名 X 用戶表示 Claude 協助他找回 11 年前遺失的 5 枚比特幣錢包，當時購買價格約 $1,250，現已價值接近 $40 萬。
